ADD.name: Acute Diarrhoeal Disease
ADD.description: Elevated turbidity indicates faecal contamination. NDWI and AWEI indicate flood extent causing contamination spread.

Cholera.name: Cholera
Cholera.description: NDCI indicates algal blooms where Vibrio cholerae thrives. CDOM provides organic matter as Vibrio growth medium. LST >25°C accelerates Vibrio proliferation.

Typhoid.name: Typhoid / Enteric Fever
Typhoid.description: Salmonella typhi survives in turbid water with faecal contamination. NDWI/AWEI indicate waterlogged areas spreading contamination.
